name: agent-index-filesystem-gdrive
description: Filesystem adapter for Google Drive and Shared Drives
author: agent-index

client_id.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID from the org's Google Cloud project.

client_secret.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret from the org's Google Cloud project.

drive_id.description: Google Shared Drive ID. Omit for personal Drive.

root_folder_id.description: Folder ID to use as filesystem root. Omit for Drive root.
